query:
SELECT 
  c.name as consultant_name,
  pc.quoted_design_fee,
  pc.quoted_supervision_fee,
  pc.supervision_submitted,
  pc.true_design_fee,
  pc.design_scope_gap_cost
FROM cpa_project_consultants pc
JOIN cpa_consultants c ON c.id = pc.consultant_id
LIMIT 10;
